-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----

I just tried to access "www.adminia.es".  The site is asking for a
username/password combo.  Because of this we are unable to verify the
information provided (and to process this PR at the moment).

Feedback from the sender of the PR about the status of the website is
required therefore.


- --
